criteria.description: Controller.js line coverage is at least 97% with the focused Deno test suite.
criteria.reasoningSummary: Fresh Deno coverage evidence reports watchjson/Controller.js at 100.0% line coverage, exceeding the 97% acceptance criterion; the root deno task test also passed. A clean HEAD baseline coverage artifact records Controller.js at 95.7% line coverage before these focused test additions.

criteria.description: Runner-owned acceptance proof can read the worktree-local orchestrator config.
criteria.reasoningSummary: The missing .codex-orchestrator/config.json that caused the previous ENOENT blocker has been restored in the worktree from the orchestrator config.
